query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_profiles (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  age INT,
  zipCode VARCHAR(10),
  jobTitle VARCHAR(128),
  incomeRange VARCHAR(64),
  savingsRange VARCHAR(64),
  familySituation VARCHAR(128),
  lifeStage VARCHAR(64),
  goals JSON,
  sharedContext JSON,
  insuranceSummary JSON,
  investmentSummary JSON,
  estateExposure JSON,
  businessOwner BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  focusPreference ENUM('general', 'financial', 'both') DEFAULT 'both',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user (userId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS professional_context (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  addedBy INT NOT NULL,
  rawInput TEXT NOT NULL,
  parsedDomains JSON,
  visibleToClient BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS client_associations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  clientId INT NOT NULL,
  professionalId INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive') DEFAULT 'active',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_assoc (clientId, professionalId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS enrichment_datasets (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  applicableDomains JSON,
  dataType VARCHAR(64),
  matchDimensions JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS enrichment_cohorts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  datasetId INT NOT NULL,
  matchCriteria JSON NOT NULL,
  enrichmentFields JSON NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS enrichment_matches (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  datasetId INT NOT NULL,
  cohortId INT NOT NULL,
  matchFields JSON,
  confidenceScore FLOAT DEFAULT 0,
  applicableDomains JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS affiliated_resources (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('carrier', 'lender', 'ria', 'advanced_markets', 'general_partner') NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  contactInfo JSON,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
